text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Repeated connections to local WinRM port (5985) and repeated creation/modification attempts of HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections registry key. While svchost.exe is a legitimate process, this pattern of activity can indicate a compromised service or malicious activity attempting to configure network settings and utilize remote management.",
  "indicators": [
    "svchost.exe",
    "connect to port 5985",
    "reg_create HKLM\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\Internet Settings\\Connections",
    "repeated network connections",
    "repeated registry modifications"
  ]
}
